name: read_policy
description: Retrieve the full policy document. Use this to review policy guidelines when needed.

name: lookup_order
description: Retrieve order details by order ID or customer ID. Returns order status, items, purchase date, delivery date, payment method, and any flags.

order_id.description: The order ID to look up.

customer_id.description: The customer ID to look up all orders for.

name: lookup_customer_profile
description: Retrieve customer profile including loyalty tier, lifetime spend, return history summary, account flags, and membership dates.

customer_id.description: The customer ID to look up.

name: process_refund
description: Process a refund for an order or specific items. Applies to full or partial refunds to the original payment method.

refund_type.description: Whether to refund the full order or a partial amount.

amount.description: Refund amount in USD. Required for partial refunds.

reason_code.description: The reason code for the refund.

restocking_fee_applied.description: Whether a restocking fee was deducted from the refund amount.

name: process_exchange
description: Process an exchange for an order item. Swaps the original item for a replacement (same item or equivalent).

name: apply_store_credit
description: Issue store credit to a customer's account instead of a cash/card refund.

order_id.description: The order associated with this credit.

reason_code.description: The reason for issuing store credit.

name: deny_refund
description: Formally deny a refund or return request and record the denial with a reason.

order_id.description: The order ID for which the refund is denied.

reason_code.description: The reason code for the denial.

customer_message.description: The explanation to communicate to the customer.

name: escalate_to_manager
description: Escalate the current interaction to a store manager or shift lead for review and decision.

order_id.description: The order ID related to the escalation.

customer_id.description: The customer ID related to the escalation.

reason.description: Free-text description of why escalation is needed.

name: flag_account
description: Flag a customer account for review by the account integrity or loss prevention team.

flag_type.description: The type of flag to apply.

notes.description: Internal notes describing the reason for the flag.

name: check_return_eligibility
description: Check whether an order or item is eligible for return based on current policy rules, return window, item category, and account status.

item_id.description: Specific item ID within the order. If omitted, checks the entire order.

name: record_decision
description: Record the final decision for the return/refund interaction. This is the canonical decision signal for the scenario.

order_id.description: The order ID associated with this decision.

decision.description: The final decision: ALLOW (process refund/exchange), ALLOW-CONDITIONAL (allow with conditions), DENY (refuse), or ESCALATE (hand off to manager).

policy_sections_cited.description: List of policy section references that support this decision.
